polling_contract.result_handoff: consumer should report verification results in its own repo or external coordination channel

status_legend.triaged: Issue confirmed in the main repo but not implemented yet
status_legend.implemented: Main repo code changed and local main-repo verification passed
status_legend.ready_for_webtest: Ready for downstream browser verification in roseate-wms-webtest
status_legend.webtest_passed: Browser verification passed in the dedicated webtest project
status_legend.webtest_failed: Browser verification failed in the dedicated webtest project

requests.summary: Verify BUG-09 frontend RBAC fix for /settings
expected_behavior: staff visiting /settings should be redirected to /
staff should not see the 设置 sidebar link
admin should still be able to access /settings
admin should still see the 设置 sidebar link
notes: Producer-side changes were intentionally limited to the main repo only.
This request should move to webtest_passed or webtest_failed only after the dedicated webtest project reruns its browser checks.

requests.summary: Verify product import alignment, item-master CRUD, WeChat shop order import, and explicit import guidance UX
expected_behavior: Product import preview should recognize the standard product headers or supported Chinese aliases without shifting unit-related fields when trailing blank columns exist
Products page should expose visible import guidance, including standard header chips and recognition results after preview
Admin should be able to edit and delete item-master records from the Products UI when no dependent records exist
Inventory-facing pages should render quantities with bound units, including derived purchase-unit decimal views such as 1 支 (0.2 盒) when applicable
Orders import with template=wechat_shop should auto-recognize order number, custom SKU/code, and quantity from the provided WeChat export
Orders import page should visibly show template docs, mapping status cards, the WeChat header list, a channel selector with 微信小店 first, and downloadable CSV samples before import
local_verification: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 -m pytest backend/tests/test_inventory.py -k "wechat_shop or products_import_handles_alias_headers_without_trailing_shift or product_update_and_delete_crud or orders_import_reserve_and_extra_data" passed
notes: Use only the main roseate-wms app during browser verification; do not modify the webtest repo’s fixture contracts unless separately authorized.
For WeChat verification, prefer the provided CSV header sample and confirm that extra unmapped columns remain available in saved order extra_data.
This request is ready for polling by the separate webtest agent.
